compilerHints.selectorHint: All tools in this provider run shell commands through the RTK token-compression proxy, reducing LLM context usage by 60-90%.

tools.name: rtk_git_status
tools.description: Show the working tree status, compressing the output to eliminate noise before returning to the LLM. Equivalent to 'git status' but with 60-90% fewer tokens.

cwd.description: Working directory to run git status in (default: current directory)

compilerHints.selectorHint: git repository status working tree changes staged unstaged

tools.name: rtk_git_diff
tools.description: Show changes between commits, commit and working tree, etc., with RTK token compression. Equivalent to 'git diff' but returns a compressed diff that preserves all signal while eliminating boilerplate.

ref.description: Commit ref, branch, or range (e.g. HEAD~1, main..feature)

file.description: Limit diff to a specific file or path

compilerHints.selectorHint: git diff changes patch lines added removed

tools.name: rtk_git_log
tools.description: Show the commit log with RTK compression to summarize history without token bloat. Equivalent to 'git log' but compressed.

ref.description: Branch or commit ref to start from

compilerHints.selectorHint: git log history commits messages authors

tools.name: rtk_cargo_test
tools.description: Run Cargo tests with RTK compression — reduces test output from thousands of tokens to a concise summary of passes, failures, and error details.

filter.description: Test name filter (passed to cargo test)

compilerHints.selectorHint: rust cargo tests unit integration run test suite

tools.name: rtk_cargo_build
tools.description: Build a Rust project with Cargo, with RTK compression to surface only errors and warnings without noise.

tools.name: rtk_cargo_clippy
tools.description: Run Clippy (Rust linter) with RTK compression — surfaces only actionable lint warnings and errors, not verbose pass messages.

compilerHints.selectorHint: rust clippy lint static analysis warnings

tools.name: rtk_npm_test
tools.description: Run npm test (Jest, Vitest, Mocha, etc.) with RTK compression — reduces test output to passing count and full failure details only.

compilerHints.selectorHint: npm node javascript typescript jest vitest mocha tests

tools.name: rtk_npm_install
tools.description: Run npm install with RTK compression — suppresses verbose dependency tree output and returns only warnings, errors, and the install summary.

package.description: Package to install (omit for npm install)

tools.name: rtk_pytest
tools.description: Run Python pytest tests with RTK compression — returns only failed test names, errors, and the summary line. Suppresses verbose passing output.

path.description: Test file or directory path (default: current dir)

tools.name: rtk_go_test
tools.description: Run Go tests with RTK compression — returns only failures and the final summary. Suppresses verbose PASS lines.

tools.name: rtk_eslint
tools.description: Run ESLint with RTK compression — returns only errors and warnings, grouped by file, with counts. Suppresses passing file messages.

compilerHints.selectorHint: eslint javascript typescript lint code quality

tools.name: rtk_tsc
tools.description: Run TypeScript compiler (tsc) with RTK compression — returns only type errors, deduplicated and grouped by file.

noEmit.description: Type-check only, no output files (default: true)

compilerHints.selectorHint: typescript tsc type check compile errors

tools.name: rtk_grep
tools.description: Search for patterns in files with RTK compression — deduplicates results, groups by file, and truncates excessive matches intelligently.

compilerHints.selectorHint: grep search find text pattern files

tools.name: rtk_find
tools.description: Find files matching criteria with RTK compression — groups results by directory and truncates very large result sets to the most relevant matches.

compilerHints.selectorHint: find files directories filesystem search locate

tools.name: rtk_ls
tools.description: List directory contents with RTK compression — groups files by type, sorts by recency, and deduplicates when listing multiple directories.

tools.name: rtk_gain
tools.description: Show RTK token savings analytics dashboard — displays total commands processed, input/output token counts, per-command savings breakdown, and historical trends.

json.description: Output as JSON instead of formatted table

compilerHints.selectorHint: rtk analytics token savings statistics dashboard metrics
